performed_via_github_app.description:
## CI Built for Maintainers
Test pull requests without publishing to npm or cloning and installing locally.

### Here's how it works:
* CodeSandbox CI builds a version of your library for every PR.
* Builds get posted to our registry for testing in CodeSandbox or locally⁠.
* Bug reports with reproducible sandboxes are automatically created using the new PR build to review online.

For more information, see our [documentation](https://codesandbox.io/docs/ci).

![CodeSandbox CI bot](https://uploads.codesandbox.io/uploads/user/e4e9e8d4-095e-446c-8ad1-4e13fb5aecfb/Ceip-csbCIBotComment.png)
performed_via_github_app.name: CodeSandbox CI
